runtime_model: Unified replay reconstruction now supports persisted and non-persisted modes.
Direct runtime callers preserve persisted append-only report behavior by default.
CLI chain inspection uses non-persisted reconstruction for operationally read-only show commands.
Inspection reports remain deterministic, replay-visible, and hash-addressed in output.
Optional persisted reconstruction artifacts remain valid for explicit audit evidence.
replay_integrity: Source replay wrapper hashes are still validated.
Source artifact hashes are still validated.
Reference continuity checks are still enforced.
Append-only report writes are still append-only when persistence is requested.
Default CLI inspection does not create report artifacts and therefore cannot collide on repeat.
operator_usability: No timestamp or report-root workaround is required for ordinary inspection.

validation_commands.summary: First execution returned READY and did not persist inspection report artifacts.
Second execution returned READY without append-only artifact collision.
